description:
Change the color theme of the open flowchart (flowchart_en.eddx) in Wondershare EdrawMax to 'Warm' and save the updated file as /home/ga/themed_flowchart.eddx. Dismiss any login dialogs that appear.

    *   Wait, I'll check the "Preserve backstory" again. There is no backstory here.

    *   Final check on "No UI tutorials".
    *   "mentions specific tool/button names"
    *   "Warm" is a theme name, not a button name (though it might be on a button). It's the value to be set.
    *   "Color theme" is the property.

    *   This is good.

    *   One
